response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 10+ years of experience across TypeScript/Node.js, cloud-adjacent work, and recent exposure to MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, the resume shows limited demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, or major cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) at the scale the Staff FDE role demands. The customer-facing technical leadership and AI-specific track record required for a Staff GenAI FDE role appears thin compared to the 8+ years of AI solution delivery the role specifies.
strengths: 10+ years of software engineering with TypeScript/Node.js and polyglot adaptability
Recent hands-on exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong engineering excellence background — TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and public talks
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years building production GenAI/AI solutions or RAG/vector DB systems
Limited demonstrated experience with major cloud platforms beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz
No explicit customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed consulting experience shown

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow experience at re:cinq
Strong engineering fundamentals and TypeScript depth
